proof_queue_entry_blockers.reason: data/as_proof_pack_queue.json has queue_count=0, and harvest_live_grade_path says actual_proof_queue_member=false / planner_can_enter_proof_pack=false for this shape.
Exact TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER proof is positive but thin: 17 TP trades, 0 TP losses, proof floor 20, gap 3.
The current LIMIT/STOP proof-collection intents are DRY_RUN_BLOCKED, not proof-queue eligible.
This exact shape is overall positive only after TP wins, but system MARKET_ORDER_TRADE_CLOSE leakage remains material and must not be hidden.
harvest_live_grade_path reports no positive spread/slippage proof attached; absence of a negative row is not live-grade proof.
Global acceptance is still blocked; SCOUT must not hide negative expectancy or month-scale replay findings.
guardian receipt consumption has normal_routing_allowed=false and classifications=NEEDS_OPERATOR_REVIEW; operator review is stale/current-P0 blocked.
live_order_request is NO_ACTION, broker snapshot is not fresh relative to this plan, and the last GPT decision is an old CANCEL_PENDING receipt, not a fresh TRADE/SCOUT proof receipt.

missing_evidence.detail: Need at least 3 additional exact EUR_USD SHORT BREAKOUT_FAILURE TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER samples without introducing TP losses, bringing TP sample count from 17 to >=20.
Exact TP HARVEST expectancy is positive, but global capture_economics remains NEGATIVE_EXPECTANCY: 229 trades, win_rate=0.5983, payoff_ratio=0.393, expectancy=-177.4 JPY/trade, net=-40616.9 JPY.

harvest_live_grade_path shows no direct month-scale blocker for this exact shape, but profitability_acceptance still has MONTH_SCALE_TP_PROGRESS_REPLAY_STILL_NEGATIVE globally. Any direct residual blocker for this shape would make SCOUT invalid.
The shape has 10 MARKET_ORDER_TRADE_CLOSE losses for -7636.3 JPY. SCOUT proof must be attached-TP HARVEST only and must not rely on market close leakage.
guardian receipt consumption/operator review prevents normal routing. SCOUT cannot go through any gateway while normal_routing_allowed=false.
Current intent packet has RANGE forecast, no directional projection support, LONG chart bias, operator-manual same-theme block, stale/freshness gaps, and no fresh GPT proof receipt.
No attached positive spread/slippage or bid/ask replay proof for the exact current SCOUT vehicle.

scout_mode_reason: SCOUT design is worth keeping as a future proof-collection contract because the exact attached-TP HARVEST sample is 17 wins / 0 TP losses with only 3 samples to the proof floor, min-lot is numerically feasible, and harvest_live_grade_path finds no direct target month-scale blocker. It is not currently allowed because guardian/operator review blocks normal routing, current intent gates are BLOCK, proof_queue_count=0 is not permission, and fresh broker truth plus a fresh GPT proof receipt are missing.
max_loss_jpy_cap_basis: Use the current loss_asymmetry_guard_effective_max_loss_jpy / observed average winner cap from order_intents for this exact shape. This is below the current normal live base max_loss_jpy reference of 2871.8597. Do not derive lot or loss cap from remaining_to_4x.

scout_contract_if_unblocked.vehicle: LIMIT only; non-market attached technical TP HARVEST; no MARKET proof scout and no failed-side STOP chase
scout_contract_if_unblocked.proof_queue_permission: only after evidence_success_conditions pass on fresh artifacts
risk_controls: units must remain >= 1000 and must not be calculated from remaining_to_4x
no order send without fresh broker truth, fresh GPT receipt, RiskEngine live validation, strategy-profile validation, guardian/operator clearance, and gateway approval

invalid_conditions: Any live order send, cancel, close, position modification, or launchd mutation is requested by the SCOUT plan itself.
guardian_receipt_consumption.normal_routing_allowed remains false or GUARDIAN_RECEIPT_OPERATOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED remains present.
Fresh broker truth and a fresh GPT TRADE/SCOUT proof receipt are missing.

The current target lane remains DRY_RUN_BLOCKED by RANGE_FORECAST_REQUIRES_RANGE_ROTATION, SELF_IMPROVEMENT_FORECAST_ADVERSE_PATH, OPERATOR_MANUAL_SAME_THEME_ADD_BLOCKED, or chart-direction conflict that has not been resolved by fresh evidence.
The vehicle is MARKET, a failed-side STOP chase, RUNNER_NO_BROKER_TP, or any shape other than exact EUR_USD SHORT BREAKOUT_FAILURE attached-TP HARVEST.
max_loss_jpy would exceed 418.0, units would fall below 1000, or sizing is derived from remaining_to_4x instead of current equity/risk evidence.
Spread/slippage or bid/ask replay is negative or missing for the exact current vehicle.
A direct month-scale residual blocker appears for EUR_USD SHORT BREAKOUT_FAILURE, or the current month-scale replay remains unresolvable.
Market-close leakage is used as a proof path or any planned proof requires a market close instead of broker attached TP.
Any TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER loss appears in the exact TP proof set before proof_queue admission.
partial TP plus runner is treated as live permission rather than a diagnostic-only replay hypothesis.
withdrawal_conditions: Stop pursuing SCOUT if the next refreshed artifacts still cannot reduce the exact sample gap or if the exact TP sample adds any TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER loss before reaching the proof floor.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if spread-included replay remains missing or negative for the exact LIMIT attached-TP HARVEST vehicle.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if market-close leakage cannot be contained without using cancel/close/market-exit behavior.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if a direct month-scale residual blocker appears for EUR_USD SHORT BREAKOUT_FAILURE or if global month-scale replay remains negative with no target-specific containment path.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if guardian/operator review cannot set normal_routing_allowed=true or current P0/P1 guardian issues remain.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if fresh broker truth reprices the vehicle below the 1000-unit production floor, above the 418.0 JPY max-loss cap, or into adverse spread/slippage.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if current market evidence keeps RANGE forecast without valid BREAKOUT_FAILURE HARVEST geometry, LONG chart bias, or SELF_IMPROVEMENT_FORECAST_ADVERSE_PATH as hard blockers.
Stop pursuing SCOUT if proof acquisition would require deriving lot from remaining_to_4x or relaxing any existing gate.
